title: Two earbuds screen/second screen, right zoom in
scenario: Tapping right circle button on two-earbuds screen triggers zoom-in and displays new text in Quick Start Guide/onboarding flow
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Navigate to the onboarding / Quick Start Guide (QSG) screens.
On the two-earbuds screen (second screen), locate the right circle button.
expected: The view should zoom in and display new text related to the Quick Start Guide or onboarding flow.
